chunks.title: Alkaline Water Myths
chunks.summary: The speaker discusses the misconceptions surrounding alkaline water, emphasizing that excessive alkalinity can harm the body. They clarify that the body naturally regulates pH levels and highlight the potential issues with consuming too much alkaline water.
chunks.transcript: let's start with alkaline water we can save a lot of oxygen here and just say it's i have a bottle of alcohol and water that i was going to bring up for the podcast but i left it downstairs i was filming some videos with it on the side of the bottle it says immunity booster complete you could drink way too much alkaline water and make your body too alkaline it's not a good thing your body is used to drinking water that has a neutral ph water is usually ph of seven that's just what it is alkaline water is you don't need to alkalinize your body the idea that you need to be excessively alkaline or that alkalinity will predict cancer is total horseshit your body regulates your ph that is the uh the amount of hydrogen ions or the log of the hydrogen ion concentration in your body so closely 7.35 7.45 you can get metabolic alkalosis you can get respiratory alkalosis there's all sorts of problems you can become too alkalotic and you could probably become too alcoholic by drinking too much alkaline water too much baking soda your body needs to be a certain ph that's how the cellular reactions in your body function i also think this is kind of connected a little bit with apple cider vinegar which i also think is and has no real benefits for humans other than perhaps if you have underlying stomach issues and you actually don't have enough stomach acid drinking something that's super acidic might help be a surrogate acid but why wouldn't you just correct the root cause of your stomach acid that's low in the first place apple cider vinegar is but apple cider vinegar won't alkalinize you i don't think it'll make you acidic either i heard a doctor on youtube saying that apple cider vinegar would make more acidic and that was a cure for the chronic alkalinity because of our hyper cortisolemia and i'm just thinking oh my god this guy's so full of it's total so alkaline water you don't need that drink regular clean pure water if you want to remineralize it great i don't think it's necessary for most of us but alkaline water that's all i need to say is you don't want high

chunks.title: Apple Cider Vinegar Misconceptions
chunks.summary: The video addresses the alleged benefits of apple cider vinegar, suggesting it has no real benefits for most individuals and can potentially harm tooth enamel. The speaker offers a perspective on its use as a crutch rather than addressing the root cause of low stomach acid.
chunks.transcript: ph alkaline water don't do that don't drink a bunch of acid all the time either don't drink apple cider vinegar unless you want to erode the tooth enamel if you have reflux if you have gi issues figure out the cause of those

chunks.title: Skepticism Towards Structured Water
chunks.summary: The speaker expresses disbelief regarding the claims made about structured water, arguing that such products are scams with no substantial evidence supporting their effectiveness. They mock the idea of needing elaborate methods to 'structure' water.
chunks.transcript: many proponents of structured water would say that there is this fourth phase of water uh general pollock who's at the university of washington has done some interesting research on exclusion zone of water they put water next to a gel membrane and they do see this exclusion zone where water may in a liquid form form a gel-like structure where it is a little bit more hexagonal he says it's like ice but it's not ice okay maybe now to extrapolate that to devices that cost 500 to 2 000 and move the water into vortex and that structures water is too much for me does my water coming out of a uh reverse osmosis filter is that dead water is that unstructured water i just can't i can't get behind this guys i just don't think that i need to put my water through a vortex and spin it and restructure it um according to most of these websites i could restructure the water just by doing a dance naked in the moonlight in my house in costa rica and putting it in the suns maybe i'll just do that to try and restructure it that's obviously a joke i think if you do reverse osmosis water that's about as good as you can get i don't think you need to restructure it please don't spend 500 on a device that spins your water in a vortex and restructures it if that were the case all the water coming out of your toilet would be very structured and you should just flush your toilet and collect all the water because it's creating this beautiful vortex and you should just drink your toilet water construction water right so i'm unconvinced about structured water i think it's a basically a pretty big scam i think most of the research on it has not been in any way shape or form repeated in any in any consistent way and i i really look forward to somebody doing some consistent research on structured water and showing that's better for humans but i think that it's a scam and i wouldn't do it and i don't think crystals are going to structure water either don't fall for that

chunks.title: Health Risks of Alkaline Water
chunks.summary: The discussion continues with the potential health risks associated with drinking alkaline water, particularly its impact on digestion and stomach acid levels. The speaker warns against using it as a solution for reflux and highlights the importance of maintaining natural acid-alkaline balance.
chunks.transcript: adjunct in the treatment of reflux disease  you know what i also make your stomach contents very alkaline a proton pump inhibitor or an h2 blocker which have horrible consequences yes if you drink baking soda or ph 8.8 water it will cause your stomach acid to be less acidic which is a real problem for your digestion in general it doesn't fix reflux you're still going to reflux you're just going to reflux more alkaline contents in the esophagus you're not going to digest your food you're not going to absorb your nutrients and you have an increased rate of dementia and i believe an increased rate of community acquired pneumonia if we look at the studies with proton pump inhibitors so interestingly ph 8.8 alkaline water instantly denatures pepsin that's a that's an important digestive enzyme perhaps not something you want to denature so i don't know why you want to use alkaline water to do that just like you wouldn't want to be doing a whole bunch of baking soda in your life that's going to cause problems too so let your body adjust its acid alkaline balance there

chunks.title: Balancing Acid and Alkaline Foods
chunks.summary: Finally, the speaker talks about the natural balance between acid and alkaline foods in diets, particularly in children. They suggest that incorporating both types of foods can be beneficial, which relates to dietary practices like including fruits in an animal-based diet.
chunks.transcript: was a podcast they did a long time ago where i actually talked about the ability of children to self-select acid and alkaline foods there are indeed acid and alkaline foods your body will adjust and your urinary ph will be the ultimate arbiter generally kids will mix and balance acidic and alkaline foods i don't think either is bad you don't want all alkaline foods you don't want all acidic foods either i think this is one of the reasons that you could make or one of the one of the stances you could take for including fruit or some plant products like fruit but not vegetables on your animal base rather than carnivore diet
